environment.s: air pollution violation: $18K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

execPay.ratio: Approximately 3500:1 or higher (based on CEO stock awards)

wiki.extract: Wayfair Inc. is an American multinational e-commerce company based in Boston, Massachusetts that sells furniture and home goods online. Formerly known as CSN Stores, it was founded in 2002, and currently offers 14 million items from more than 11,000 global suppliers. The company maintains international operations, including locations in North America and in Canada, Ireland, China and the United Kingdom.

cases.caseName: Artistic Tile, Inc. v. AEA Investors LP
Induction Devices LLC v. Wayfair LLC

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Exterior and musculoskeletal structures of the back  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was loading merchandise into a truck when their right foot stepped on a 4-way dolly, causing them to lose balance and fall to the ground, hitting their chin on the sideboard. The employee was hospitalized for injury to their spine.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Exterior and musculoskeletal structures of the back  unspecified
sampleRecords.event_description: Overexertion while materials moving by hand
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was stacking boxes when he sustained muscle strains in his back. The employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Part of occupant s body caught between vehicle and other object in nonroadway transport incident
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was driving a reach truck out of the parking area when the vehicle veered into a guardrail. The employee's foot was crushed between the vehicle and the guardrail, resulting in foot injuries that required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was loading a truck when a powered industrial truck ran over his foot, resulting in a broken foot that required hospitalization.

sampleRecords.event_description: Nonroadway collision with other vehicle, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was driving an electric pallet jack down an aisle. The pallet jack collided with a moving stand-up forklift and the employee suffered fractures to fingers on their right hand.

sampleRecalls.title: Sivan Dressers Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Tip-Over and Entrapment Hazards; Multiple Violations of Federal Regulations for Clothing Storage Units; Sold on Wayfair.com by Anji Guyou Furniture
